zh.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneux是William de Molyneux的兒子，於1071年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓。他於大約1106年與Sywarde在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1109年在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Vivian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneux was born in 1071, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William de Molyneux. He married Sywarde about 1106, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1109, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneux est né en 1071, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William de Molyneux. Il a épousé Sywarde environ 1106, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1109, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneuxは1071年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでWilliam de Molyneuxの息子として生まれた。約1106年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでSywardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1109年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneux(은)는 1071년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 William de Molyneux의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1106년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sywarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1109년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Vivian de Molyneux родился в 1071 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William de Molyneux. Он женился на женщине по имени Sywarde около 1106 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1109 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.
